reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the birth dates for Emilio Sánchez and Andrei Olhovskiy.
2. Compare the two birth dates and return the older tennis player.
original_final_question: Which tennis player is older, Emilio Sánchez or Andrei Olhovskiy? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Emilio Sánchez was born on 29 May 1965, while Andrei Olhovskiy was born on 15 April 1966, so Emilio Ángel Sánchez Vicario is older. -> Emilio Ángel Sánchez Vicario
Final answer: Emilio Ángel Sánchez Vicario
